title: helenium viscosum
intro: Helenium viscosum, also known as sticky helenium or yellow sneezeweed, is a perennial wildflower native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Helenium viscosum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
